TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kanakanavu kakiliman "kanakanavu"Ść°ťā£Ść°ťā£ŚĮĆśóŹ."hla'alia" a binacadan i Alisan Namtus Sinyi cuwme a miyazu'ay a binacadan a tadimaw. i kasumamadan palicaden han tu nu "Cou" a binacadan. nilaculan satu caay lalecad ku kamu nu heni, maliyuh a masasakamu, uyza satu natuluay a binacadan izaw tu lu teked nu laylay nuheni tu kamu tu lalangawan, u lisin atu u lalangawan tuas a bungka a kawaw. na tatusaay a binacadan misingsi tu sakalaheci, cenhu i 103 a mihcaan enen a bulad tudabataan izaw ku enem padahkal musakamu tu tatengaay tu a binacadan "Kanakanavu" namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: kanakana*u kakir~…ĺiman "kanakana*u"******."ńßr~…ĺa Ē~ °ar~…ĺia" a bina ¶adan i ar~…ĺisan namtus sinji ¶uwm…ô a mijazu Ē~ °aj a bina ¶adan a tadimaw. i kasumamadan par~…ĺi ¶ad…ôn ńßan tu nu " ¶ou" a bina ¶adan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan satu ¶aaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kamu nu ńß…ôni, mar~…ĺijuńß a masasakamu, ujza satu natur~…ĺuaj a bina ¶adan izaw tu r~…ĺu t…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nuńß…ôni tu kamu tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u r~…ĺisin atu u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tuas a buŇčka a kawaw. na tatusaaj a bina ¶adan misiŇčsi tu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ¶…ônńßu i *** a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôn a bur~…ĺad tudabataan izaw ku …ôn…ôm padańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu tat…ôŇčaaj tu a bina ¶adan "kanakana*u" namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: kanakanavu kakiliman "kanakanavu"Ść°ťā£Ść°ťā£ŚĮĆśóŹ."hla'alia" a binacadan i Alisan Namtus Sinyi cuwme a miyazu'ay a binacadan a tadimaw. i kasumamadan palicaden han tu nu "Cou" a binacadan. nilaculan satu caay lalecad ku kamu nu heni, maliyuh a masasakamu, uyza satu natuluay a binacadan izaw tu lu teked nu laylay nuheni tu kamu tu lalangawan, u lisin atu u lalangawan tuas a bungka a kawaw. na tatusaay a binacadan misingsi tu sakalaheci, cenhu i 103 a mihcaan enen a bulad tudabataan izaw ku enem padahkal musakamu tu tatengaay tu a binacadan "Kanakanavu" namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: kanakana*u kakir~…ĺiman "kanakana*u"******."ńßr~…ĺa Ē~ °ar~…ĺia" a bina ¶adan i ar~…ĺisan namtus sinji ¶uwm…ô a mijazu Ē~ °aj a bina ¶adan a tadimaw. i kasumamadan par~…ĺi ¶ad…ôn ńßan tu nu " ¶ou" a bina ¶adan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan satu ¶aaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kamu nu ńß…ôni, mar~…ĺijuńß a masasakamu, ujza satu natur~…ĺuaj a bina ¶adan izaw tu r~…ĺu t…ôk…ôd nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nuńß…ôni tu kamu tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u r~…ĺisin atu u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tuas a buŇčka a kawaw. na tatusaaj a bina ¶adan misiŇčsi tu sakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i, ¶…ônńßu i *** a mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôn a bur~…ĺad tudabataan izaw ku …ôn…ôm padańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu tat…ôŇčaaj tu a bina ¶adan "kanakana*u" namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
